Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Feral Kavats that roam the Orokin Derelict on Deimos

包含库娃的遗传密码序列。

获取地点：通过对漫游在火卫二 Orokin 遗迹中的野生库娃使用资料库扫描仪获得

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Feral Kavats that roam the Orokin Derelict on Deimos

Hallowed Flame Endurance Caches, Rotation C

description.canonical:
This bait is composed of materials that are known to attract Murkrays, a fish found only in Plains of Eidolon ocean hotspots during both day and night.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
这种鱼饵是由已知能吸引阴暗鳐的材料所组成。这种鱼无论日夜皆只能在海洋鱼点中寻获。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait attracts predatory fish that are active in the Plains of Eidolon during either day or night.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Attracts Sharrac and Karkina in the ocean.
description.display:
这种鱼饵可以吸引白天或晚上活跃的捕食者鱼类。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。吸引海洋中的鲨客和卡其那。

description.canonical:
This bait attracts fish that are active in the Plains of Eidolon during the day.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Attracts Mawfish and Charc Eels in the lake; Khut-Khut, Yogwun, and Mortus Lungfish in ponds; and Goopolla and Tralok in the ocean.
description.display:
这种诱饵可以吸引白天在夜灵平野活动的鱼类。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。吸引湖中的喉鱼和查克鳗；池塘中的库特-库特、约格温和摩图斯肺鱼；以及海洋中的古泊拉和塔洛。

description.canonical:
A chunk of the wyrm Fass, collected after his explosive death in the Cambion Drift. Used to attract Glutinox on the surface during Vome, Ostimyr at surface hotspots during Fass, and Vitreospina in caves during Fass/Vome.

Location: Cambion Drift on Deimos while Vome is active
description.display:
属于蛟龙“混乱”的一大块东西，是在他爆炸死亡后收集的。可以用来吸引“秩序”期间地面中的狍鸮胶蛳、“混乱”期间地面鱼点中的奥斯蒂剑鱼，以及“秩序”/“混乱”期间洞穴中的璃化脊鳎。

获取地点：“秩序”活跃时的火卫二魔胎之境

drops.location: Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A
Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A
Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation A

description.canonical:
Matter from the body of the Wyrm Fass, purged of toxins, and rendered usefully. Used to attract Aquapulmo and Flagellocanth in Cambion Drift surface hotspots, Aquapulmo only during Vome.

Obtained from Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos).
description.display:
来自于蛟龙“混乱”身上的物质，清除了毒素后变得有用了。可以用来吸引魔胎之境地面鱼点中的水肺和须腔棘鱼、“秩序”期间的水肺。

从殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”处获得。

description.canonical:
A gobbet of raw flesh, fallen from the wyrm Vome in her death spasm. Used to attract Chondricord and Duriod in Cambion Drift cave hotspots during Fass and Vome.

Location: Cambion Drift on Deimos while Fass is active
description.display:
在蛟龙“秩序”的死亡痉挛时，从她身上掉下来的一块生肉。可以用来吸引“秩序”/“混乱”期间魔胎之境洞穴鱼点中的骨锥琼鲷和韧铠灵鲷。

获取地点：“混乱”活跃时的火卫二魔胎之境

drops.location: Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation B
Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation B
Deimos/Cambion Drift (Level 30 - 40 Cambion Drift Bounty), Rotation B

description.canonical:
The flesh of Vome, refined, and ready for use. Used to attract Myxostomata in Cambion Drift cave hotspots during Vome.

Obtained from Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos).
description.display:
“秩序”的肉，经过提炼且随时可用。可以用来吸引“秩序”期间魔胎之境洞穴鱼点中的独角米索鳎。

从殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is composed of exotic materials that are known to attract the elusive Glappid, a fish found only in Plains of Eidolon ocean hotspots during the night.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
这种鱼饵是由已知能吸引神出鬼没的盖拉佩德的奇特材料所组成，这种鱼只能在夜间夜灵平野的海洋鱼点中寻获。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is composed of materials that are known to attract Norg, a fish found only in Plains of Eidolon lake hotspots during the night.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
这种鱼饵是由已知能吸引诺格的材料所组成。这种鱼只能在夜间夜灵平野中的湖泊鱼点中寻获。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is composed of materials that are known to attract Cuthols, a fish found only in Plains of Eidolon pond hotspots during the night.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
这种鱼饵是由已知能吸引克苏尔的材料所组成。这种鱼只能在夜间夜灵平野中的池塘鱼点中寻获。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is composed of aromatic tetraxin that is known to attract Mirewinders, a Servofish found in Orb Vallis cave hotspots.

Obtained via The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由芳香性的四氢素组成，能够吸引污泥绕环者，一种出没于山洞鱼点中的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is synthesized from complex hexophenol that is known to attract Charamotes, a Servofish found in Orb Vallis cave hotspots.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由复杂的己苯酚合成，能够吸引重筑虾，一种可于山洞鱼点中找到的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is synthesized from specialized A-disulphex-A compounds that are known to attract Synathid, a legendarily rare Servofish found only in Orb Vallis cave hotspots.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由特制的A－二硫科斯－A化合物合成，能够吸引海龙，一种可于山洞鱼点中找到的传奇稀有伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
A simple cocktail of short-chain polymers and contaminants. Easily detected by rudimentary Servofish in the Orb Vallis under all conditions, but ignored by more specialized models. Good for Sapcaddies (found in the lake), and Tinks and Brickies (found in ponds).

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
一种短链聚合物及污染物的简单混合。在所有情况下都能轻易被奥布山谷中基本的伺服鱼侦测到，但是被更特殊型的伺服鱼所忽略。适用于液集者（可在湖泊找到）、修补机和砖瓦匠（可在池塘找到）。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is synthesized from Methacalcene-1 that is known to attract Krillers, a Servofish found in Orb Vallis lakes during warm weather.

Obtained via The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由甲烷活性钙-1合成，可以吸引磷虾杀手，一种可在温暖天气中于湖泊中找到的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is synthesized from beryzene that is known to attract Longwinders, a Servofish found in Orb Vallis lake hotspots during warm weather.

Obtained via The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由铍苯合成，用于吸引长型环绕者，一种可在温暖天气的湖泊中找到的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This endochlor/dionium melange attracts both Recasters and Eye-Eyes, Servofish found in Orb Vallis ponds. The Eye-Eye shows up during warm weather and Recasters shows up at Hot Spots during cool weather.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种内型联氯 / 釱元素的混合物可以吸引续播机和目－目这类可以在池塘内找到的伺服鱼。目－目会在温暖天气时出现，续播机则在天气寒冷时出现在鱼点中。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
This bait is synthesized from long-chain LS-74 compounds that are known to attract Tromyzon, a Servofish found in Orb Vallis pond hotspots during cool weather.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
这种鱼饵由长链的 LS-74 化合物所合成，可以吸引多目鳗，一种可以在寒冷天气中池塘鱼点中找到的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 处获得。

description.canonical:
Copies the dominant genes of a pet onto the template. 
This can then be used to increase the chances that traits from the original pet will carry across to a newborn clone.
description.display:
把一只宠物的显性基因复制到模板上。
这块模板随后可以被用来增加原宠物将性状带给新生克隆体的几率。

description.canonical: This device facilitates the growth of a Kubrow or Kavat clone, from birth to adolescence.
description.display: 这个装置能让库狛克隆体或库娃克隆体从出生成长至幼年时期。

description.canonical:
This egg is used to transplant the genetic code of a Kubrow onto a Kubrow clone.

Location: Kubrow Dens found in Grineer Forests on Earth
description.display:
这个蛋是用来将库狛的遗传密码转移到库狛克隆体上。

获取地点：Grineer 森林（地球）中的库狛兽穴

drops.location: Hallowed Flame Mission Caches, Rotation C
Hallowed Flame Endurance Caches, Rotation C

description.canonical: Contains 6 DNA Stabilizers to maintain the health of a Kubrow or Kavat.
description.display: 内装有 6 份 DNA 稳定剂，可用于稳定库狛与库娃的生命迹象。

description.canonical: An army composed of vapor-level Specter clones to be used in defense of the clan's Solar Rail. This Specter army will persist for one conflict.
description.display: 一支由幻雾等级魅影复制人所组成的军团，用来防御氏族的星际轨道。这支魅影军团可以坚持一场战斗。

description.canonical: An army composed of force-level Specter clones to be used in defense of the clan's Solar Rail. This Specter army will persist for three conflicts.
description.display: 一支由原力等级魅影复制人所组成的军团，用来防御氏族的星际轨道。这支魅影军团可以坚持三场战斗。

description.canonical: An army composed of cosmic-level Specter clones to be used in defense of the clan's Solar Rail. This Specter army will persist for four conflicts.
description.display: 一支由无极等级魅影复制人所组成的军团，用来防御氏族的星际轨道。这支魅影军团可以坚持四场战斗。

description.canonical: An army composed of phase-level Specter clones to be used in defense of the clan's Solar Rail. This Specter army will persist for two conflicts.
description.display: 一支由相位等级魅影复制人所组成的军团，用来防御氏族的星际轨道。这支魅影军团可以坚持两场战斗。

description.canonical:
A sample of the corrosive substance that Scaldra use to purge Techrot. Handle with care.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
炽蛇军用来净化科腐者的腐蚀性物质样本。需小心处理。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
An Efervon-resistant material used to craft Scaldra uniforms.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
一种耐艾弗旺的材料，用于制作炽蛇军制服。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
These curious Techrot growths still quivered in sympathy with Temple’s music long after the gig was over.

Location: Stage Defense missions in Höllvania.
description.display:
即使演出早就结束了，这些奇怪的科腐者生长物仍然随着 Temple 的音乐而舞动。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚的舞台防御任务。

description.canonical:
This motherboard likely served as a nerve center, facilitating the Techrot’s communication network.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
该主板很可能起到了神经中枢的作用，促进科腐者的通讯网络。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
This twisted husk barely resembles the electronic device it once was, consumed and reshaped by the Techrot’s relentless spread.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
这个扭曲的外壳已经不再像曾经的电子设备，它被科腐者的无情蔓延所吞噬并重塑。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
Höllvanian ingenuity knows no bounds, and this unregulated marvel is proof! A cutting-edge device brimming with untamed innovation.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
霍瓦尼亚人的创造力是无穷的，这个不受管制的奇迹就是证明！一款充满狂野创新的尖端设备。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
The Countessa isn’t just an icon—she’s a hero! Issues from this cult classic comic series are sought after by subculture enthusiasts who know the value of a strong and stylish protagonist. Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
伯爵夫人不仅仅是一个偶像——她还是一个英雄！这个经典邪典漫画系列的期刊，深受亚文化爱好者的追捧，他们知道强大而时尚的主角的价值。与莱蒂交换这个六人组宝物，以获取六人组声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
The ultimate gift for fans of On-lyne! Show your love and support with this must-have merch for any music lover’s collection. Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
这是送给线上时代粉丝的终极礼物！用这款必备商品来表达你的热爱和支持，它是任何音乐爱好者的收藏品。用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
A set of liquid comfort perfect for anyone who deserves a moment to unwind. Ideal for someone carrying the weight of the world on their shoulders. Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
一套液体放松饮品，非常适合那些肩负世界重担、需要片刻喘息的人。用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
Sleek, stylish, and soothing, mood crystals are the perfect gift for anyone in need of a little calm. Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
心情水晶造型时尚、美观且令人放松，是送给需要冷静一点的人的完美礼物。用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
A nostalgic treat for the ultimate ‘90s kid! Remember those commercials with the cheerful mouse quartet? Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
这是送给 90 年代孩子的怀旧礼物！还记得那些有欢快的老鼠四重奏的广告吗？用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
For the documentarian who sees the world through a unique lens, extra film is always a win. Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
对于对世界有独特视角的纪录片制作人来说，影片越多越好。用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
Who doesn't like pizza? Trade this Hex Treasure with Lettie to earn standing with The Hex.

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
谁不喜欢披萨？用这个六人组珍品与莱蒂交易，换取六人组的声望。

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
Burgers so tasty they always disappear!

Location: 1999 (Höllvania)
description.display:
汉堡美味可口，总是一扫而光！

获取地点：霍瓦尼亚（1999 年）

description.canonical:
The manifestation of Thrax's malevolence that shapes the Orowyrms' outbursts.

Location: Rewarded upon defeating the Orowyrm in Duviri
description.display:
士魂大帝恶念的显化之物，塑造了奥金魇龙的情绪爆发。

获取地点：在双衍王境击败奥金魇龙后获得的奖励

description.canonical:
Its power lies in its potential.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
它的力量在于它的潜能。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
A whisper of the fallen.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
亡者的低语。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
Rune Marrow erupts from Duviri’s core.

Location: The Undercroft in Duviri
description.display:
密印髓质从双衍王境的核心中喷出。

获取地点：双衍王境地穴

description.canonical:
Kullervo's fury incarnate. Acrithis will trade this prized artifact for certain items from her collection.

Location: Earned by confronting Kullervo and defeating the Orowyrm in the same Duviri mission during the Fear, Anger, or Sorrow spiral
description.display:
Kullervo 的愤怒化身。可以用这件珍贵的神器与言录使换取她收藏的某些物品。 

获取地点：在恐惧、愤怒或悲伤复眠螺旋中对抗 Kullervo 并在同一个双衍王境任务中打败奥金魇龙

description.canonical:
Duviri citizens plagued by nightmares seek Tasoma, because its stalks can be crushed to create juice that invites pleasant dreams. Unfortunately, it is difficult to forage Tasoma as it only grows in caves.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
被噩梦缠身的双衍王境公民们找寻塔苏摩，因为将它的茎压榨后可以制成带来美梦的果汁。但遗憾的是，塔苏摩只生长于洞穴，因此很难被找到。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical: A Tasoma fungal spore, suitable for growing in the Dormizone’s garden.
description.display: 一种塔苏摩真菌孢子，适合在居住舱的花园中种植。

description.canonical:
Duviri citizens harvest Kovnik leaves to blend invigorating teas.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
双衍王境的公民们采集福烁草叶子来调配提神茶。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
Duviri citizens have been known to mash Eevani leaves into a paste that alleviates the discomfort caused by fresh wounds.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
据说双衍王境的居民会把延凡草的叶子捣碎成糊状，来缓解新伤口引起的不适。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
The water that courses through Connla Sprouts tastes sweet and refreshing.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
流经慧泉嫩芽的水尝起来甜美清新。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
The warm light of the Yao Shrub glows even within cold dark places.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
瑶丛即使在寒冷阴暗的地方也能散发温暖的光亮。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
It is traditionally held that to see Silphsela floating in the air heralds an imminent change in the sky.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
传统上认为，看到日精灵瘦果漂浮在空中预示着天空即将发生变化。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
Dracroot is a staple of the Wyrmling’s diet.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
龙旋根是魇龙幼体的主食。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
Ueymag meat is said to be delicious. Just mind the barbs.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
据说肉麦的肉很好吃。但需小心其倒刺。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
Thrax warriors use the heavy liquid drawn from Saggen Wells to polish their weapons.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
士魂大帝的战士们使用从慧珠之泉提取出来的重质液体来擦拭他们的武器。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical:
A token celebrating the successful solution of a Duviri Enigma.

Location: Earned by completing Enigmas in The Duviri Experience
description.display:
庆祝成功破解双衍王境奥理的纪念物。

获取地点：在双衍历程中完成奥理

description.canonical:
It is said that Aggri Formations are hardened saliva from mighty Orowyrms. Duviri citizens believe Aggristones are powerful talismans.

Location: Duviri
description.display:
据说龙涎结晶是来自强大奥金魇龙的硬化唾液。双衍居民们相信龙涎石是强大的护身符。

获取地点：双衍王境

description.canonical: Some theorize that Duviri stands upon the shell of a giant Inaak. Naturally, some wonder what the giant Inaak stands upon. The answer, of course, is other Inaaks, all the way down.
description.display: 有些理论认为，双衍王境坐落在一只巨大的载世龟壳上。自然而然地，一些人会想知道巨大的载世龟是站在什么之上的。答案当然是其他载世龟，一个接一个叠到底部。

description.canonical: The Golden Maw finds Xirans exceptionally delicious.
description.display: 黄金喉兽发现息壤鲳特别美味。

description.canonical: Haav prefer to swim near the surface. Duviri citizens often mistake them for logs, which can be startling when Haav show their fangs.
description.display: 浮伤鱼喜欢在靠近水面的地方游。双衍王境的公民经常把它们误认为木头，当浮伤鱼露出它们的尖牙时，可能会让人大吃一惊。

description.canonical: The Namaes has evolved the ability to tense its tail muscles and use its tail as a fearsome weapon.
description.display: 纳土鲉已经进化出收紧尾部肌肉的能力，并把它的尾巴当成一种可怕的武器。

description.canonical: The Seonn’s ability to flare its neck and hood makes it impossible for most predators to swallow, but the Golden Maw can overcome its defense.
description.display: 精灵鱼的颈部和头鳍可以伸展，让大多数的捕食者无法吞咽，但是黄金喉兽可以攻克它的防御。

description.canonical:
Collectors like to marvel at the peculiar origin of Nacreous Pebbles. Their beauty is the result of ordinary pebbles having been ingested and regurgitated by the Golden Maw.

Location: Maw Feeding in The Duviri Experience
description.display:
收藏家们喜欢惊叹于珍珠母石的特殊来源。它们的美丽是普通鹅卵石被黄金喉兽吞食和反刍的结果。

获取地点：在双衍历程中喂食喉兽

description.canonical:
Each Duviri fish species has distinct features, but they all evolved beautiful chromatic scales.

Location: Maw Feeding in The Duviri Experience
description.display:
每一种双衍王境鱼类都具有与众不同的特征，但它们都进化产生了美丽的彩色鳞片。

获取地点：在双衍历程中喂食喉兽

description.canonical:
Looks like someone got carried away during a delicious meal.

Location: Maw Feeding in The Duviri Experience
description.display:
看起来有人在一顿美餐中被冲昏了头脑。

获取地点：在双衍历程中喂食喉兽

description.canonical:
The talon on a condroc's wing is sharp enough to tear through bone.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
秃鹰翅膀上的利爪可以伤至见骨。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
Most common at night, these stone lifeforms are drawn to shorelines touched by the Eidolon. They linger around lakes on the Plains of Eidolon at all hours. Their origin remains mysterious.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
这些最常出没于夜晚的岩石生命体会被夜灵所触及的海岸线所吸引。它们随时都在夜灵平野的湖泊周围徘徊。它们的起源仍然是个谜。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
This hardy fruit is thick-skinned to withstand harsh conditions, concealing a mouthful of sweet pulp within.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
这种顽强的植物有着坚硬的外皮以抵抗严峻的环境，将饱满的甜美果肉隐藏在其中。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
The sinew from the Kuaka's spinal claws can be tanned to make resilient and flexible leather.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
从库阿卡的脊爪上取得的肌腱，可以晒制成既强韧且具弹性的皮革。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
A noxious mix of polysaccharides and long-chain polymers, Grokdrul is a standard chemical used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
多醣类与长链聚合物的有毒混合物，葛克度是标准的 Grineer 工业化学材料。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
A mineral valuable to the Ostrons.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
一种对 Ostron 人很有价值的矿物。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
Used by the Nistlebrush to trap and kill prey.

Location: Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
尼蒐丛用它来困住并杀死猎物。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）

description.canonical:
An integral component of Sentient anatomy.  Rarely found undamaged, the specimen may prove useful.

Location: Drops from Vomvalysts on the Plains of Eidolon (Earth) at night, and from Sentients found on Lua and the Veil Proxima
description.display:
Sentient 解剖结构中不可或缺的部分。这种难得完好无损的样本可能有重要用途。

获取地点：在地球夜灵平野夜晚由轰击使掉落，并且在月球与面纱比邻星域由 Sentient 掉落

description.canonical:
A Sentient Core of this quality and condition has rarely been found. Truly a special specimen.

Location: Earned by capturing Eidolons found roaming the Plains of Eidolon on Earth at night
description.display:
这种品质和状态的 Sentient 核心极为罕见。真正的特殊样本。

获取地点：通过捕获在地球夜间的夜灵平野漫游的夜灵获得

description.canonical:
A coveted sample of Sentient internal anatomy. Specimens of this age and quality are both rare and valuable. 

Location: Eidolons found roaming the Plains of Eidolon on Earth at night
description.display:
令人垂涎的 Sentient 内部解剖样本。这种年份和品质的样本既稀有又珍贵。 

获取地点：在地球夜灵平野夜晚中漫游的夜灵

description.canonical: Combine multiple Rivens to create a new, different Riven.
description.display: 将多个裂罅 MOD 组合起来创造出一个新的不同的裂罅 MOD。

description.canonical:
Torn from the bile duct of a fallen Hemocyte.

Location: Hemocytes found in Plague Star event Bounties in the Plains of Eidolon on Earth
description.display:
从死亡的免疫血胞体胆管上剥落的物质。

获取地点：夜灵平野（地球）上的瘟疫之星活动赏金任务中的免疫血胞体

description.canonical: Rare shard gained from capturing the Sentients roaming the Plains of Eidolon on Earth at night. Use it to gain Focus or to unbind Way-bound focus nodes.
description.display: 通过捕获在夜间徘徊于地球夜灵平野的 Sentient 所取得的稀有碎片。可用于获得专精点数，或解锁绑定的专精节点。

description.canonical: Rare shard gained from capturing the Sentients roaming the Plains of Eidolon on Earth at night. Use it to gain Focus.
description.display: 通过捕获在夜间中徘徊于地球夜灵平野的 Sentient 所取得的稀有碎片。可用于获取专精点数。

description.canonical: Shard gained from the Sentients roaming the Plains of Eidolon on Earth at night.
description.display: 从夜间徘徊于地球夜灵平野的 Sentient 身上所取得的碎片。

description.canonical: A curious blueprint found in the memory banks of Albrecht Entrati's Pom-2.
description.display: 在阿尔布雷希特·英择谛的石榴 2 代电脑系统记忆中发现的奇特蓝图。

description.canonical:
This curse contains knowledge that will help Fibonacci prevent enemies from breaking free of The Sanctum. Feed curses to the Jahu Gargoyle in your Clan Dojo to re-calibrate its defensive capabilities.

Location: Effervo (Deimos) during Operation Gargoyle's Cry
description.display:
这个诅咒包含了能帮助斐波那契阻止敌人逃离圣所的知识。将诅咒交给你们氏族道场的形态合成兽像，以重新调整其防御能力。

获取地点：《合成兽像的悲鸣》行动期间的恶涌（火卫二）

A foreboding fragment of the vast Indifference.

Location: Effervo (Deimos) during Operation Gargoyle's Cry
description.display:
巨大虚空无情之物的不祥碎片。

地点：《合成兽像的悲鸣》行动期间的恶涌（火卫二）

description.canonical:
A Voidtongue cry, trapped in the stone. Crucial to unraveling the secrets of the Murmur.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)
description.display:
被封印在石头里的虚空语叫声，对解开低语者的秘密至关重要。

获取地点：阿尔布雷希特的实验室（火卫二）

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  55 - 60 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C
Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  65 - 70 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C

The quietest and most elusive of Voidtongue utterances. Sought after but never found by Albrecht.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)
description.display:
虚空语中最安静、最难以捉摸的话语。阿尔布雷希特一直在寻找却从未找到。

获取地点：阿尔布雷希特的实验室（火卫二）

The deepest of Voidtongue moans, etched into stone. An unlikely asset in the construction of Albrecht's vessels.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)
description.display:
被刻进石头中的深沉的虚空语哀鸣。意外地成为了一种建造阿尔布雷希特的承载体的资源。

During the Orokin era, these obols were a commonly recognized mark of the Entrati family. Some Archimedeans even used them as good luck talismans.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)
description.display:
在 Orokin 时代，这些小银币是英择谛家族公认的标志。一些哲士甚至把它们当作幸运护身符。

获取地点：阿尔布雷希特的实验室（火卫二）

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  65 - 70 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C

This experimental array transmutes Void energy into high voltages with low currents.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)
description.display:
这个实验阵列将虚空能量转化为带有低电流的高电压。

获取地点：阿尔布雷希特的实验室（火卫二）

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  75 - 80 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C

description.canonical:
A ceremonial beacon used to map Void locations on to real space.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos) and Zariman
description.display:
用于将虚空地点映射到真实空间的仪式信标。

获取地点：阿尔布雷希特的实验室（火卫二）和扎里曼号

This Void-touched stone contains an ominous essence.

这块虚空之石蕴含着不祥的本质。

These scarce, hovering relics of the Orokin era can still be found monitoring the isolation vaults deep beneath the surface of Deimos.

这些罕见的 Orokin 时代的悬浮遗迹，仍旧监视着火卫二地底深处的隔离库。

Half-formed, incomplete spore bearers, little more than twitching flesh with claws to latch on with.

Location: Cambion Drift on Deimos
description.display:
半成型的不完整孢子载体，只是一个会用利爪固定自己的抽搐着的肉块。

description.canonical:
This refined toxin catalyst has been formulated to reinforce the Thrax Toxin and maximize damage to the Infested boil in Plague Star bounties.

Location: Bio Lab in Clan Dojo
description.display:
这种精制毒素催化剂的配方，可强化瑟拉斯毒素，并在《瘟疫之星》赏金任务中最大限度地提高对感染疖瘤产生的伤害。

获取地点：氏族道场的生物实验室

description.canonical:
Sentient immunity to the Infestation is exploited with this refined phylaxis. Formulated specifically to combat Infested boils in Plague Star bounties.

Location: Nakak's Operational Supply in Cetus
description.display:
利用 Sentient 对感染者的免疫力所制作的精制抗体。专为对付《瘟疫之星》赏金任务中的侵染疖瘤而配制。

获取地点：希图斯上娜卡处的行动补给

description.canonical:
Used to locate the Ambulas production facility.

This resource is dropped from Ambulas Units.
description.display:
用来定位量产 Ambulas 的设施。

该资源由 Ambulas 单位掉落。

description.canonical: Battle pay for Tenno fighting in Operation Scarlet Spear.
description.display: 为在《行动代号：猩红之矛》中作战的 Tenno 准备的报酬。

description.canonical:
Many Deimos fish secrete reagents in a pouchlike organ, creating volatile gases that enable limited periods of levitation. 

Source: Cut from the following Cambion Drift fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos):
Ostimyr
Aquapulmo
Vitreospina
Cryptosuctus
Barbisteo
Kymaeros
Amniophysi
Glutinox
description.display:
许多火卫二的鱼类会在类似囊状的器官中分泌液体来产生挥发性气体，从而实现短暂的悬浮。

来源：通过在殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”处分解以下魔胎之境的鱼类获得：
奥斯蒂剑鱼
水肺
璃化脊鳎
墓沼隐龙
倒刺蒂鳌
高额异鳍
针刺长鳄
狍鸮胶蛳

description.canonical:
Adaptive membranes allow many Deimos fish to move freely between fluid and gaseous environments.

Source: Cut from the following Cambion Drift fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos):
Ostimyr
Aquapulmo
Vitreospina
Myxostomata
Duroid
description.display:
自适应膜可使许多火卫二的鱼类在液体和气体环境之间自由移动。

来源：在殁世幽都（火卫二）中的“女儿”处分解以下魔胎之境的鱼类获得：
奥斯蒂剑鱼
水肺
璃化脊鳎
独角米索鳎
韧铠灵鲷

description.canonical:
The Infestation infects all fish on Deimos, even those that do not show any external mutations.

Source: Cut from all Cambion Drift fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos).
description.display:
异变感染体感染了火卫二上的所有鱼类，连那些看起来没有任何变异的鱼也感染了。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从魔胎之境鱼类中切割获取。

description.canonical:
The Infestation provokes the growth of multiple, seemingly redundant brain-like clusters, whose function may be linked to hivemind activity. 

Source: Cut from Aquapulmo and Cryptosuctus fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Aquapulmo in Cambion Drift surface hotspots during Vome, and Cryptosuctus on the Cambion Drift surface during Fass. Also drops from Requiem Obelisks and Rolizor Infested Cysts in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
感染导致了多个看似多余，且类似大脑的簇状物的生长，其功能可能与巢群活动有关。 

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从水肺和墓沼隐龙中切割获取。 可在“秩序”期间的魔胎之境地面鱼点中捕捉水肺、在“混乱”期间的魔胎之境地面上捕捉墓沼隐龙。此外它还会从魔胎之境的安魂方尖碑和偌利佐尔感染包囊掉落。

description.canonical:
Elements of other lifeforms are detectable in Infested body parts, such as this apparently parasitic clump of land-dwelling animal tissue.

Source: Cut from Vitreospina and Barbisteo fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch both Vitreospina and Barbisteo in Cambion Drift caves during Vome and Fass. Also drops from Spitia Infested Cysts in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
在 Infested 的身体部位中可以检测到其他生命形态的组成元素，例如这种明显属于陆地动物的寄生组织。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从璃化脊鳎和倒刺蒂鳌中切割获取。 可在“秩序”和“混乱”期间的魔胎之境洞穴中捕捉璃化脊鳎和倒刺蒂鳌。此外它还会从魔胎之境的斯蒂亚感染包囊掉落。

description.canonical:
Environmental contamination is co-responsible for mutations, alongside Infested cellular alteration.

Source: Cut from Ostimyr and Kymaeros fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Ostimyr in Cambion Drift surface hotspots during Fass, and Kymaeros on the Cambion Drift surface during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Infested Cysts in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
环境污染与 Infested 细胞变化，这两个都是引起突变的原因。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从奥斯蒂剑鱼和高额异鳍中切割获取。 可在“混乱”期间的魔胎之境地面鱼点中捕捉奥斯蒂剑鱼、在“混乱”和“秩序”期间的魔胎之境地面捕捉高额异鳍。此外它还会从魔胎之境的感染包囊掉落。

description.canonical:
Remnants of creatures' original bodily fluids persist post-Infestation, often crystalized or congealed into entirely new compounds.

Source: Cut from Amniophysi fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Amniophysi in Cambion Drift caves during Vome and Fass.
description.display:
生物原有的体液残余物在感染后仍会存在，通常会结晶或凝结成全新的化合物。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从针刺长鳄中切割获取。 可在“混乱”和“秩序”期间的魔胎之境洞穴捕捉针刺长鳄。

description.canonical:
These pressurized repositories of Infested spores require careful extraction or explosive rupture and local contamination may occur.

Source: Cut from Glutinox fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Glutinox on the Cambion Drift surface during Vome.  Also drops from Requiem Obelisks and Infested Cysts in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
这些存有感染孢子的加压储存囊需要被小心提取，否则就会炸裂并且可能造成局部污染。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从狍鸮胶蛳中切割获取。可在“秩序”期间的魔胎之境地面中捕捉狍鸮胶蛳。此外它还会从魔胎之境的安魂方尖碑和感染包囊掉落。

description.canonical:
The organs that once served as eyes, prior to Infestation, are still replete with useful components.

Source: Cut from Flagellocanth fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Flagellocanth in Cambion Drift surface hotspots using Processed Fass Residue during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
这件在感染前曾经作为眼睛的器官仍包含有用的成分。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从须腔棘鱼中切割获取。 可在“秩序”和“混乱”期间的魔胎之境地面鱼点中使用处理过的“混乱”残留物捕捉须腔棘鱼。此外它还会从魔胎之境的隔离库赏金掉落。

description.canonical:
Used to latch on to other life forms for feeding purposes, and to inject them with anticoagulants and sporelets.

Source: Cut from Lobotriscid fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Lobotriscid on the Cambion Drift surface during Vome.  Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
用于附在其他生命体上以供养分，并把抗凝剂和孢子注入其中。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从额叶鲤中切割获取。 可在“秩序”期间的魔胎之境地面中捕捉额叶鲤。此外它还会从魔胎之境的隔离库赏金掉落。

description.canonical:
Sifting the glutinous Exocrine is an essential part of the survival process, and a reminder of the creature's original function.

Source: Cut from Aquapulmo and Duroid fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Aquapulmo in Cambion Drift surface hotspots during Vome, and Duroid in Cambion Drift cave hotspots during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Requiem Obelisks and Auroron Entrati Caskets in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
筛分粘性的外分泌物是生存过程中必不可少的一部分，也是对生物原有功能的一种提醒。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从水肺和韧铠灵鲷中切割获取。 可在“秩序”期间的魔胎之境地面鱼点中捕捉水肺，在“混乱”和“秩序”期间的魔胎之境洞穴鱼点中捕捉韧铠灵鲷。此外它还会从魔胎之境的安魂方尖碑和幻金英择谛罐掉落。

description.canonical:
Many delicate and complex nerve fibers are housed in the jointed vertebrae, which are one of the creature's most resilient parts. Found from Vitreospina fish known to eke out a primitive existence in cave systems.

Source: Cut from Vitreospina and Chondricord fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Vitreospina in Cambion Drift caves during Fass and Vome, and Chondricord in Cambion Drift cave hotspots during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties and Sagiant Entrati Caskets in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
许多精巧而复杂的神经纤维被安置在有关节的脊椎骨中，这地方是生物最坚韧的部分之一。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从璃化脊鳎和骨锥琼鲷中切割获取。 可在“混乱”和“秩序”期间的魔胎之境洞穴中捕捉璃化脊鳎，在“混乱”和“秩序”期间的魔胎之境洞穴鱼点中捕捉骨锥琼鲷。此外它还会从魔胎之境的隔离库赏金和智者英择谛罐掉落。

description.canonical:
Beneath the membranous protein layers can be found a secondary 'skull'; flexible, tough and highly conductive.

Source: Cut from Myxostomata fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Myxostomata in Cambion Drift cave hotspots using Processed Vome Residue during Vome. Also drops from Requiem Obelisks in the Cambion Drift.
description.display:
在膜状蛋白层的下面，可以发现一个具有弹性、坚韧、且有着高导电性的次要“颅骨”。

获取途径：通过殁世幽都（火卫二）的“女儿”从独角米索鳎中切割获取。 可在“秩序”期间的魔胎之境洞穴鱼点中使用处理过的“秩序”残留物捕捉独角米索鳎。此外它还会从魔胎之境的安魂方尖碑掉落。

description.canonical:
Harvested by the Ostron as a catalyst used in their synthetics.

Source: Cut from Charc Eels via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Charc Eels in the Plains of Eidolon lake at any time of day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
被 Ostron 收割来作为合成反应的催化剂。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从查克鳗中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野湖泊中捕捉查克鳗。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Used in Ostron remedies to purify toxins.

Source: Cut from Goopolla fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Goopolla in the Plains of Eidolon ocean at any time of day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
在 Ostron 中的偏方被用来净化毒素。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从古泊拉鱼中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野海洋中捕捉古泊拉。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
An ingredient used in Ostron cooking and medicine.

Source: Cut from Murkray fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Murkray in Plains of Eidolon ocean hotspots at any time of day using Murkray Bait. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
Ostron 用来烹饪和制药的材料。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从阴暗鳐鱼中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野海洋鱼点中使用阴暗鳐鱼饵捕捉阴暗鳐。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
These will often adorn ceremonial garb or as a reagent for synthetics.

Source: Cut from Sharrac fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Sharrac in the Plains of Eidolon ocean at any time of day using Twilight Bait. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
这些常常用来装点仪式装束，或者被用来做合成的反应物。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从鲨客鱼中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野海洋中使用黄昏鱼饵捕捉鲨客。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Ground into a powder this substance can makes fires burn hotter for a brief amount of time.

Source: Cut from Karkina fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Karkina in the Plains of Eidolon ocean at any time of day using Twilight Bait. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
将这种物质磨成粉末可以短暂使得火烧得更旺。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从卡其那鱼中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野海洋中使用黄昏鱼饵捕捉卡其那。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
The bones of the Mawfish are carved by the Ostron to produce ornaments and tools.

Source: Cut from Mawfish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Mawfish in the Plains of Eidolon lake during the Day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
喉鱼的骨骼被 Ostron 人用来制作吊饰和工具。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从喉鱼中切割获取。在白天的夜灵平野湖泊中捕捉喉鱼。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
The poison is used to cure leather and as a reagent to produce an embalming fluid.

Source: Cut from Khut-Khut fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Khut-Khut in Plains of Eidolon ponds during the Day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
毒素被 Ostron 人用来加工皮革，以及作为制造一种防腐液的反应剂。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从库特-库特鱼中切割获取。在白天的夜灵平野池塘中捕捉库特-库特。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Once cleaned and tanned this organ can be turned into a durable leather.

Source: Cut from Yogwun fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Yogwun in Plains of Eidolon ponds during the Day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
一旦经过清洗和鞣制后，这种器官可以变成耐用的皮革。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从约格温鱼中切割获取。在白天的夜灵平野池塘中捕捉约格温。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
The Ostron boil these into a jelly which forms a strong adhesive when it dries.

Source: Cut from Tralok fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Tralok in the Plains of Eidolon ocean during the Day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
Ostron 人将其煮成胶状，干燥后便成为一种强力的粘合剂。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从塔洛鱼中切割获取。在白天的夜灵平野海洋中捕捉塔洛。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
The horn of the Mortus Lungfish is ground down into a powder and used by the Ostrons in herbal remedies.

Source: Cut from Mortus Lungfish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Mortus Lungfish in Plains of Eidolon ponds at any time of day. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
Ostron 的人们将摩图斯肺鱼的角碾碎成粉末状后用于草药之中。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从摩图斯肺鱼中切割获取。在任何时候的夜灵平野池塘中捕捉摩图斯肺鱼。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Used as a source of food and to create bait for predatory fish.

Source: Cut from all Plains of Eidolon Fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
被用作食物来源，并制作捕食者鱼类的诱饵。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从各种夜灵平野鱼类中切割获取。

description.canonical:
Used to create absolvents that purify gems.

Source: Cut from all Plains of Eidolon Fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
被用来制造净化宝石的溶剂。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从各种夜灵平野鱼类中切割获取。

description.canonical:
A material used in tailoring clothes and cultivating synthetics.

Source: Cut from all Plains of Eidolon Fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
这种材料被用来裁制衣物和培育合成物。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从各种夜灵平野鱼类中切割获取。

description.canonical:
This thick shell is used by Ostrons to manufacture tools and weapons.

Source: Cut from Glappid fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Glappid in the Plains of Eidolon ocean at Night using Glappid Bait. Also drops from Thumper Bulls in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
这种厚壳被 Ostron 人用来制作工具和武器。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从盖拉佩德鱼中切割获取。在夜晚的夜灵平野海洋中使用盖拉佩德鱼饵捕捉盖拉佩德。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
An Ostron delicacy.

Source: Cut from Norg fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Norg in the Plains of Eidolon lake at Night using Norg Bait. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
一种 Ostron 珍馐。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从诺格鱼中切割获取。在夜晚的夜灵平野湖泊中使用诺格鱼饵捕捉诺格。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Ostrons extract the toxin and apply it to their weapons when hunting animals.

Source: Cut from Cuthol fish via Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth). Catch Cuthol in Plains of Eidolon pond hotspots at Night. Also drops from Thumpers in the Plains of Eidolon.
description.display:
Ostron 人从中提取毒素，并将之用于狩猎。

获取途径：通过希图斯（地球）的渔人海露从克苏尔鱼中切割获取。在夜晚的夜灵平野池塘鱼点中捕捉克苏尔。此外它还会从夜灵平野重击者身上掉落。

items.displayName: 回声环绕者微孔视觉感应器

description.canonical:
A small camera that records visual data with extremely high definition.

Source: Dismantled from Echowinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Echowinder in the Orb Vallis lake during Warm weather.
description.display:
能以极高清晰度纪录影像数据的小型摄影机。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从回声环绕者伺服鱼中拆解获取。在温暖的奥布山谷湖泊中捕捉回声环绕者。

description.canonical:
A small, electronic brain capable of processing a billion giga-threads per second.

Source: Dismantled from Scrubber servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Scrubber in Orb Vallis caves during any weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
每秒能处理十亿吉字节线程的小型电子脑。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从洗涤者伺服鱼中拆解获取。在任何天气下的奥布山谷洞穴中捕捉洗涤者。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical:
A small, atomic power source.

Source: Dismantled from Brickie servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Brickie in Orb Vallis ponds and rivers during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一个小型、原子能的能源。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从砖瓦匠伺服鱼中拆解获取。在温暖的奥布山谷池塘和河流中捕捉砖瓦匠。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

items.displayName: 污泥绕环者并联生物二极体

description.canonical:
Controls the electrical flow throughout the circuitry within robotic organisms.

Source: Dismantled from Mirewinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Mirewinder in Orb Vallis caves during any weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
控制生化机器人体内电路系统的电流。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从污泥环绕者伺服鱼中拆解获取。在任何天气下的奥布山谷洞穴中捕捉污泥环绕者。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical:
A machine element used to propel robotic organisms through coolant.

Source: Dismantled from Eye-Eye servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Eye-Eye in Orb Vallis ponds during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一种可以让生化机器人在冷却液中推进的机器组件。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从目－目伺服鱼中拆解获取。在温暖的奥布山谷池塘中捕捉目－目。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical:
A weapon that discharges lasers over short distances.

Source: Dismantled from Kriller servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Kriller in the Orb Vallis lake during Warm weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一把能发射短距离激光的武器。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从磷虾杀手伺服鱼中拆解获取。在温暖的奥布山谷湖泊中捕捉磷虾杀手。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical:
A strong, metallic case that is resistant to fluctuations in environmental temperature.

Source: Dismantled from Sapcaddy servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Sapcaddy in the Orb Vallis lake during Cold weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一个坚固、金属制的箱子，能抵抗环境温度的波动。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从液集者伺服鱼中拆解获取。在寒冷的奥布山谷湖泊中捕捉液集者。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical:
A sample of sprockets, gyros and wires.

Source: Dismantled from all Orb Vallis servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:
链轮、陀螺仪与电线的样品。 

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从伺服鱼中拆解获取。

description.canonical:
A processing unit that efficiently monitors environmental data.

Source: Dismantled from Synathid servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Synathid in Orb Vallis cave hotspots during any weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一个有效地监控环境数据的处理组件。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从海龙伺服鱼中拆解获取。在任何天气下的奥布山谷洞穴鱼点中捕捉海龙。此外它还会从奥布山谷剥削者圆蛛身上掉落。

description.canonical:
A solvent that reconstitutes waste product from the Weeping Towers into degenerated matter.

Source: Dismantled from Tromyzon servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Tromyzon in Orb Vallis Pond Hotspots during Cold weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一种将渗流之塔的废弃物重建为简并物质的溶剂。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从多目鳗伺服鱼中拆解获取。在寒冷的奥布山谷池塘中捕捉多目鳗。此外它还会从奥布山谷剥削者圆蛛身上掉落。

description.canonical:
A device used to reconstruct degenerated matter into Orokin bio-material.

Source: Dismantled from Charamote servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Charamote in Orb Vallis cave hotspots during any weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
一个用于将简并物质重建为 Orokin 生物材料的装置。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从重筑虾伺服鱼中拆解获取。在任何天气下的奥布山谷洞穴鱼点中捕捉重筑虾。此外它还会从奥布山谷剥削者圆蛛身上掉落。

description.canonical:
Discharges excess heat and energy through the casing.

Source: Dismantled from Tink servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Tink in Orb Vallis ponds during Cold weather.
description.display:
经由外壳释放多余的热量和能量。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从修补机伺服鱼中拆解获取。在寒冷的奥布山谷池塘中捕捉修补机。

items.displayName: 长型环绕者车床凝聚剂

description.canonical:
A liquid that mixes with coolant fluid to produce a resilient gel that repairs leaks.

Source: Dismantled from Longwinder servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Longwinder in Orb Vallis lake hotspots during Warm weather.
description.display:
混合了冷却液，产生出一种有弹性的凝胶，用于修复裂缝。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从长型环绕者伺服鱼中拆解获取。在温暖的奥布山谷湖泊鱼点中捕捉长型环绕者。

description.canonical:
Interprets signals from other mechanical organisms.

Source: Dismantled from Recaster servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Recaster in Orb Vallis pond hotspots during Cold weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.
description.display:
用于理解来自另一个机械有机体的讯号。

获取途径：通过福尔图娜（金星）的 The Business 从续播机伺服鱼中拆解获取。在寒冷的奥布山谷池塘鱼点中捕捉续播机。此外它还会从奥布山谷资源储藏箱中掉落。

description.canonical: Struck to commemorate the Entrati family’s power and prestige, as well as safeguarding their memories of one another. Many things changed in the years that followed, and that which had once shone brightly grew dark and dim. But even a single Ayatan Star may make all the difference.
description.display: 这尊雕像之所以被打造出来，不仅是为了纪念英择谛家族的实力与威望，同时也是为了保存家族成员之间的珍贵记忆。时过境迁，曾今闪耀的雕像现已变得暗淡无光。但只要插上一颗阿耶檀识星，它就会变得截然不同。

description.canonical:
Refined purity freed from the Infested mass.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.
description.display:
从感染生物处精炼得到的提纯物。

火卫二上殁世幽都的奥塔出售的蓝图。

description.canonical:
Infested neurotransmitters condensed under pressure.

Location: Cambion Drift (Deimos) from Blue Mining Lesions, Sagiant Entrati Caskets, and Bonus Vaults in Isolation Vault Bounties.
description.display:
感染神经递质在压力下凝结而成。 

获取地点：魔胎之境（火卫二）上的蓝色矿痕、智者英择谛罐、隔离库赏金任务中的额外隔离库

description.canonical:
Crystalline symmetry, a far cry from its corrupt origin.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.
description.display:
与其肮脏的来源有天壤之别的对称晶体。

火卫二上殁世幽都的奥塔出售的蓝图。

description.canonical:
Rivulets of Exocrine fluid, hardened over passing centuries.

Location: Cambion Drift (Deimos) from Blue Mining Lesions, Sagiant Entrati Casket, and Bonus Vaults in Isolation Vault Bounties.
description.display:
固化了几个世纪的外分泌液。

获取地点：魔胎之境（火卫二）上的蓝色矿痕。智者英择谛罐、隔离库赏金任务中的额外隔离库

description.canonical:
Purged of spores and contaminants, this alloy is highly versatile.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.
description.display:
用途非常广泛的，清除了孢子和污染物的合金。

火卫二上殁世幽都的奥塔出售的蓝图。

description.canonical:
Sinewy and metallic, possessed of great elastic strength.

Location: Cambion Drift (Deimos) from Yellow Mining Lesions, Spitia Infested Cysts, and Rolizor Infested Cysts.
description.display:
有韧性和金属感，具有很强的弹性。

获取地点：魔胎之境（火卫二）上的黄色矿痕、斯蒂亚感染包囊、偌利佐尔感染包囊

description.canonical:
Fused with its inert Infested tendrils into a durable alloy.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.
description.display:
与它无生命的感染卷须融合成一种耐用的合金。

火卫二上殁世幽都的奥塔出售的蓝图。

description.canonical:
Malleable, owing to ingrown veins of Infestation protein.

Location: Cambion Drift (Deimos) from Yellow Mining Lesions, Rolizor Infested Cysts, and Bonus Vaults in Isolation Vault Bounties.
description.display:
由于感染者蛋白的内陷脉络而具有可塑性。

description.canonical:
Facets gleam with the un-light of the Void.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

Forma that can apply the UMBRA polarity.

Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

用于微电子和能量武器的软金属。

description.canonical: A corrupted decryption key dating back to the founding of the city of Corposium. Millions of these Holokeys were lost to the Void when Parvos Granum's flagship was bombed. Strongly desired by Ergo Glast.

items.displayName: 认知 & 冲击灵化之源

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to send forth a spectral axe during aerial and slide attacks in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下重击具有在空中和滑行攻击时发出一把光谱战斧的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to temporarily increase Range and inflict guaranteed <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Status for all attacks after a successful slide attack in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这把武器的技能，在灵化形态下成功进行滑行攻击后，暂时增加攻击范围同时其所有攻击都可造成 <DT_SLASH_COLOR>切割异常状态。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to increase Range and Heavy Attack Efficiency in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有增加范围和重击效率的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to send forth spectral daggers during Heavy Attacks in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下重击具有发射光谱匕首的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to create a <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin Damage field after a kill in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有击杀产生 <DT_POISON_COLOR>毒素伤害力场的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain Heavy Slam Efficiency and leave behind <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage fields after Heavy Slams in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有提高重型震地效率，重型震地攻击后留下 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害力场的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to embed blades that explode with <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage during Forward and Neutral Combos in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下进行向前和中立连击时具有嵌入带有 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的爆炸刀片的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to increase Initial Combo and Wind Up Speed in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有提升初始连击和重击准备速度的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to greatly increase its range in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有大幅提升范围的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to spawn spectral daggers on kill. Daggers seek out enemies, applying max <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold Status stacks.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下击杀敌人会生成光谱匕首的能力。匕首会自动寻找敌人，造成最大的 <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>冰冻异常状态叠层。

items.displayName: 西伯利亚冰锤灵化之源

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to create a <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold Blast Radius with Heavy Slams, slowing enemies and increasing Critical Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有在重型震地攻击时制造一片 <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>冰冻爆炸范围，还有减缓敌人速度和增加暴击伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to stun nearby enemies when it enters Incarnon Form and after Finisher attacks.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在进行灵化形态时和进行处决攻击后具有晕眩附近敌人的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire three short-range beams that chain link enemies in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下发射三道短程光束链接敌人的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to prioritize <DT_SLASH_COLOR>Slash Damage and gain Multishot in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有优先造成 <DT_SLASH_COLOR>切割伤害并获得多重射击的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain Radial <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage with each shot in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下每次射击具有范围 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain an Auto Fire mode and deal Radial <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage with each shot in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下每次射击具有自动射击模式和造成范围 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire high power beams and gain <DT_MAGNETIC_COLOR>Magnetic Damage.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射高能光束并造成 <DT_MAGNETIC_COLOR>磁力伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to sacrifice silence for increased projectile size and <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有牺牲静音以增加投射物大小和 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire embedding projectiles that explode with <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下发射造成 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害爆炸的嵌入式投射物的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage energy waves that bounce off enemies and terrain in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射遇到敌人和地形反弹的 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害能量波的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire homing and bouncing <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage explosives in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射追踪和反弹式 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害爆炸物的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to sacrifice silence for increased projectile size and <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有牺牲静音以增加投射物大小和 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain increased Status Chance and Multishot while slowing fire rate in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有降低射速、增加触发几率和多重射击的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire staggering explosive projectiles in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射令敌人失衡的爆炸投射物的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire 4-round bursts and gain <DT_EXPLOSION_COLOR>Blast Status.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下可发射 4 连发并造成 <DT_EXPLOSION_COLOR>爆炸异常状态的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire a long-range <DT_POISON_COLOR>Toxin beam in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射远距离 <DT_POISON_COLOR>毒素光束的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to launch target-seeking fireballs that ricochet toward enemies in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射自动瞄准并弹向敌人的火球的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire high-powered grenades in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下发射高能榴弹的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to increase its Range and Ricochet in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有增加范围和跳弹的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to increase its Critical Chance the longer it is fired uninterrupted.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有连续射击时间越长暴击几率越大的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain embedding projectiles that explode with <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下获得造成 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害爆炸的嵌入式投射物的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain an Auto Fire mode and Ricochet in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有自动射击模式和跳弹的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to project a wide <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage beam in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射一束广范围 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害光束的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire projectiles that pull enemies into a <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>Cold Damage explosion in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下发射投射物将敌人拉入 <DT_FREEZE_COLOR>冰冻伤害爆炸中的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to seek Headshots and increase Multishot in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有追踪爆头和增加多重射击的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to gain Punch Through and Ricochet in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有穿透和跳弹的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to fire energy waves that deal <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation and Punch Through damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有发射造成 <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>辐射和穿透伤害的能量波的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to ricochet its bullets.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下的子弹跳弹能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to rapidly empty its entire magazine in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有高速全弹发射的能力。

description.canonical: Awaken this weapon's ability to charge a large single shot that deals Radial <DT_FIRE_COLOR>Heat Damage in Incarnon Form.
description.display: 唤醒这个武器在灵化形态下具有蓄力进行一次造成范围 <DT_FIRE_COLOR>火焰伤害的大型单发射击的能力。

This rare metal is foreign to the Origin System and can only be found in asteroids that have made the long journey from other stars.

description.canonical:
This common plant can only be found during the day. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Sunlight Threshcone plants that grow on Earth
description.display:
这种常见的植物只能在白天找到。

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的日光去壳毬果植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.canonical:
This common plant can only be found at night. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Moonlight Threshcone plants that grow on Earth
description.display:
这种常见的植物只能在夜晚找到。 

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的月光去壳毬果植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.canonical:
This plant was introduced to arid regions across the Origin System, for its ability to collect moisture in harsh environments. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Ruk's Claw plants that grow on Mars
description.display:
这种植物被引进遍布于始源星系的干旱地带，储存水分的能力使其得以对抗严酷的环境。 

获取地点：通过扫描器扫描生长在火星的 Ruk 之爪以获取

description.canonical: Extracted from Skateweed.
description.display: 从鳐鱼草中萃取出的精华物。

description.canonical:
One of the few known plant species able to thrive on asteroids in deep space. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Vestan Moss plants that grow on Mercury, Saturn, and Sedna
description.display:
为数不多的能够在外太空小行星上繁衍生息的已知植物物种之一。 

获取地点：通过扫描器扫描生长在水星、土星和赛德娜上的灶神藓以获得

description.canonical: Extracted from a Cerulean Fungus colony.
description.display: 从蔚蓝菌群中萃取出的精华物。

description.canonical: Extracted from a Ghost Brush.
description.display: 从鬼影之拂中萃取出的精华物。

description.canonical:
This rare plant can only be found during the day. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Sunlight Jadeleaf plants that grow on Earth
description.display:
这种稀有的植物只能在白天找到。 

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的日光玉叶植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.display:
这种稀有的植物只能在夜晚找到。 

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的月光玉叶植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.canonical:
This uncommon plant can only be found during the day. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Sunlight Dragonlily plants that grow on Earth
description.display:
这种罕见的植物只能在白天找到。

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的日光龙百合植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.canonical:
This uncommon plant can only be found at night. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Moonlight Dragonlily plants that grow on Earth
description.display:
这种罕见的植物只能在夜晚找到。 

获取地点：通过对地球上生长的月光龙百合植物使用资料库扫描器获得。

description.canonical:
This resilient plant provides a natural food source in frigid areas of the Origin system. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Frostleaf plants that grow on Venus, Neptune, and Pluto
description.display:
这种坚韧不拔的植物在始源星系的寒冷地区提供了天然的食物来源。 

获取地点：通过扫描器扫描生长在金星、海王星和冥王星上的霜叶以获得

description.canonical:
This robust, carnivorous plant has adapted to conditions in polluted waters. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Dusklight Sarracenia plants growing in Grineer Shipyards found commonly on Ceres
description.display:
这种强壮的食虫植物已经适应了在污染水域下生存。 

获取地点：通过扫描器扫描常见于谷神星，生长在 Grineer 造船厂的尘光瓶子草以获取

description.canonical:
This carnivorous plant can be found growing in the wilderness on Lua. 

Location: Obtained by using a Codex Scanner on Lunar Pitcher plants that grow on Lua
description.display:
这种食虫植物可以在月球的荒野之中找到。 

获取地点：通过扫描器扫描生长在月球的月之猪笼草以获取

description.canonical:
Formed over billions of years, these crystals are most often found embedded in space rock.

Location: Railjack Missions
description.display:
这些晶体形成了数十亿年，最常被发现嵌入太空岩石中。

获取地点：航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
Once installed, these delicate power systems fuse with a Corpus Obelisk's engines. Unused capacitors are therefore, highly prized.

Location: Railjack missions in Venus, Neptune, and Pluto Proximas
description.display:
安装后，这些精致的电源系统将与 Corpus 方尖碑引起融为一体。因此，未被使用的电容器非常珍贵。 

获取地点：比邻星域（金星、海王星、冥王星）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical: A rare bacterial entity that increases the spread of Infestation found on Infested Ships.
description.display: 一种罕见的细菌实体，可以促进感染战舰上发现的感染的扩散传播

description.canonical:
Resilient components used to reinforce the plated sheets of metal strapped to Grineer Ships.

Location: Eximus units in the Grineer Shipyard Tileset, and Railjack missions in Earth, Saturn, and Veil Proximas
description.display:
用于加固绑在 Grineer 战舰上的镀金板的弹性部件。

获取地点：Grineer 船坞场景中的卓越者单位、比邻星域（地球、土星、面纱）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
A cell of encapsulated Void energy.

Location: Lua
description.display:
一个封装着虚空能量的单元。

获取地点：月球

description.canonical:
Vital components used in the creation of Corpus photon-networks.

Location: Eximus units in the Corpus Ice Planet Tileset, and Railjack missions in Venus, Neptune, and Pluto Proximas
description.display:
用于创建 Corpus 光子网络的重要部件。

获取地点：Corpus 冰原星球场景中的卓越者单位、比邻星域（金星、海王星、冥王星）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical: A rare Orokin material used to create a tear in space and allow safe passage through the Void.
description.display: 一种稀有的 Orokin 材料，用于撕裂空间以安全通过虚空。

description.canonical:
Antimatter fuel cell that powers the Grineer Ships.

Location: Railjack missions in Earth, Saturn, and Veil Proximas
description.display:
为 Grineer 战舰提供动力的反物质燃料电池。

获取地点：比邻星域（地球、土星、面纱）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
A self-replicating fluid comprised of nanoproxies capable of independently repairing worn and damaged systems.

Location: Railjack missions in Venus, Neptune, and Pluto Proximas
description.display:
一种由纳米机器人组成并且能自我复制的液体，能够独立修复磨损和损坏的系统。

获取地点：比邻星域（金星、海王星、冥王星）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical: Orokin devices used for navigating the solar winds.
description.display: 用于应对太阳风的 Orokin 设备。

description.canonical:
A component used in secure Grineer communication networks.

Location: Railjack missions in Earth, Saturn, and Veil Proximas
description.display:
一块用于确保 Grineer 通信网络安全的组件。

获取地点：比邻星域（地球、土星、面纱）中的航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
Nullstones do not conform to several laws of physics, making them highly prized for optimizing sensitive components.

Location: Railjack Missions
description.display:
虚无碎片并不符合几条重要的物理定律，因其可用于高灵敏度部件的优化而非常珍贵。

获取地点：航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
A parasitic growth that often infects Eximus units operating in Infested environs.

Location: Eris
description.display:
在感染者环境中的卓越者单位经常受到的一种寄生物感染。

获取地点：阋神星

description.canonical:
High-density alloy armor plating used in the construction of offensive spacecraft.

Location: Railjack Missions
description.display:
用于建造攻击性战舰的高致密合金装甲板。

获取地点：航道星舰任务

description.canonical:
This highly malleable metal was exploited in great quantities by the Orokin and can now only be found within space rock.

Location: Railjack Missions
description.display:
这种柔软的金属曾被 Orokin 过度开采，现在只能在太空陨石里找到。

获取地点：航道星舰任务

description.canonical: An organ found on Infested Ships believed to facilitate communication within the Infested Hivemind.
description.display: 一种在感染者飞船上发现的器官，被认为能促进感染者蜂巢群体思维的交流。

description.canonical: An integral building block in the construction of Tenno relays.
description.display: Tenno 中继站构造中的一个组成部分。

description.canonical: With a blazing orange hue and rigid material strength, this compound is prized by ship and station architects.
description.display: 这种化合物具有炽热的橙色色调和坚硬的材料强度，受到船舰及中继站建筑师的青睐。

description.canonical: A highly purified mineral compound prized for its strength, resiliency, and resistance to heat. Widely used in the construction of Tenno relays.
description.display: 高纯度矿物质化合物，因其强度，弹性和耐热性而备受推崇。广泛用于 Tenno 中继站的建造。

description.canonical:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards
description.display:
此生体聚合物可以制造出可供武器使用的毒素。 

获取地点：生物实验室（氏族道场）和 Infested 爆发奖励

description.canonical:
These samples could advance our knowledge of biological research.

Location: Eris and Deimos
description.display:
这些样本有助于使我们的生物研究水平更进一步。

获取地点：阋神星和火卫二。

description.canonical:
Detonite injectors are the basis for explosive and incendiary weapons.

Location: Clan Research (Chem Lab in the Dojo) and Grineer Invasion Rewards
description.display:
爆燃喷射器是爆炸和燃烧类武器的基础。

获取地点：化学实验室（氏族道场）和 Grineer 入侵任务奖励

description.canonical:
Researching the Detonite traces within could advance our weapon technology.

Location: Venus, Earth, Lua, Ceres, Saturn, Sedna, and the Kuva Fortress
description.display:
对爆燃安瓿内的残留物进行研究，可推动我们的武器技术。

获取地点：金星，地球，月球，谷神星，土星，赛德娜和赤毒要塞。

description.canonical: A cipher used to decode Corpus intel. Crafting component required to create a CORPUS VOID KEY
description.display: 一种用来破解Corpus 电脑密码的解码器。制造CORPUS 虚空钥匙组件所必要的组件。

description.canonical: A Corpus datamass containing encrypted intel. Crafting component required to create a CORPUS VOID KEY
description.display: 一个内含加密情报的 Corpus 数据块。制造CORPUS 虚空钥匙组件所必要的组件。

description.canonical:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards
description.display:
氏族技术人员利用能量包围力场控制高热能物质以利于武器化。

获取地点：（道场中）能源实验室的氏族研究和 Corpus 入侵任务奖励

description.canonical:
This destroyed Fieldron could further research into super-heated containment fields.

Location: Venus, Mars, Jupiter, Europa, Neptune, and Pluto
description.display:
借由损坏的电磁力场装置可促进有关高热能物质能量包围力场方面的研究。

获取地点：金星，火星，木星，欧罗巴，海王星和冥王星。

The Taxmen call it an investment in our future, but loans to cover vocational and specialist training almost always cost more than you'll ever earn. Especially with the interest.

Obtained from Bounties in the Orb Vallis (Venus), or purchased from Ticker in Fortuna (Venus).

description.canonical:
Sometimes a rig jockey needs a helping hand, so they get an advance on the next pay. Massive interest rates almost guarantee they'll be paying that off forever.

Obtained from Bounties in the Orb Vallis (Venus), or purchased from Ticker in Fortuna (Venus).
description.display:

description.display: 部署一名堕落重型机枪手单位为你战斗。

description.display: 设置一个为你战斗的堕落枪兵卓越者魅影。

description.canonical: Give unto The Void a generous 100,000 credits.
description.display: 献给虚空的一大笔 100，000 元现金。

description.canonical: Give unto The Void 10,000 credits.

description.canonical: Call in a designated crew member for backup in non-Railjack missions.
description.display: 在非航道星舰任务中，召唤一名指定的舰员作为后备支援。

description.canonical: Field-and-forget, the Beckonsnare emits an ultrasonic frequency enticing to targeted lifeforms. Upon entering they are comfortably contained within a one-way photon fence for easy collection at your convenience.
description.display: 一种采田忘野的装备，引诱陷阱可发出对目标生命体具有吸引力的超声波频率。目标进入后，它们轻松地被圈在一个单向光子围栏内，以便您轻松采收。

description.canonical: Want a more spectacular fireworks display to show your patriotism? Celebrate in style with this single use consumable item.
description.display: 想要以更壮观的烟火表演来展现你的爱国精神吗？以这个仅限一次使用的道具来庆祝吧。

description.canonical: Celebrate the holiday with fireworks! Light up the sky with this single use consumable item.
description.display: 用烟火来欢庆假日！以这个仅限一次使用的道具来点亮整片天空吧。

description.canonical:
Dyes the waters with a compound that sticks to fish passing through it, making them easier to see from the shore.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
用一种混合物给水域染色，这种混合物会附着在经过的鱼身上，使它们从岸边更容易被看到。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical:
A compound that relaxes nearby fish.

Obtained from Fisher Hai-Luk in Cetus (Earth).
description.display:
一种可以让附近的鱼放松的混合物。

从希图斯（地球）的渔人海露处获得。

description.canonical: When activated, it disrupts a Fomorian core's Omega energy field, making it vulnerable. Also shields Tenno from Omega radiation.
description.display: 启动时它会破坏巨人战舰核心的奥米伽能量力场，使其变得脆弱易损。并为暴露在奥米伽辐射中的 Tenno 提供庇护。

description.canonical: Launches a magnetic prism to display your chosen Glyph. Only one may be deployed at a time, and charges are consumed on use.
description.display: 发射一道电磁光谱来展示你所选取的浮印。同一时间只能部署一个，并且一旦使用将消耗道具。

description.canonical: Launches a magnetic prism to display your chosen Glyph. Only one may be deployed at a time, and charges are unlimited.
description.display: 发射一道电磁光谱来展示你所选取的浮印。同一时间只能部署一个，并且可以无限次地使用。

description.canonical: A replicant cloned from a Warframe which can be deployed to assist Tenno on their missions.
description.display: 一个战甲的克隆复制品，可以部署来协助 Tenno 执行任务。

description.canonical: Specialized trap for attracting and slowing the movement of synthesis targets.
description.display: 用以吸引或减缓结合目标移动速度的特制陷阱。

drops.location: Cephalon Simaris, Kinetic Siphon Trap x 10

description.canonical: Creates 50x Pherliac Pods that releases powerful pheromones to attract the Infested.
description.display: 制造 50个 费洛髂荚囊，能释出强烈的费洛蒙吸引感染者。

description.canonical:
Plumb the depths with this crafty fishing spear that's barely detectable to Infested and hybrid/Orokin fish. Due to its Infested aspect, it's one of the only known things that can pass through exocrine. 

Obtained from Daughter in the Necralisk. This spear is most effective on fish found in the Cambion Drift (Deimos).
description.display:
用这把狡黠的鱼叉来探索深渊，感染者和感染者/Orokin 混种鱼类几乎无法察觉它。由于它的感染属性，它是已知的少数几种可以穿过外分泌液的鱼叉。 

从殁世幽都的”女儿“处获得。这根鱼叉对魔胎之境的鱼类最有效。

description.canonical:

description.canonical: Creates 50x Potent Pherliac Pods that releases powerful pheromones to attract the Infested.
description.display: 制造 50 个强效费洛髂荚囊，能释出强烈的费洛蒙吸引感染者。

description.canonical: Injects antiserum into Vaporizers or the user to prevent armor degradation.
description.display: 将抗血清注入雾化器或是使用者本身，可防止护甲被侵蚀。

description.canonical: Synthesize a genetic data of the target and uploads it to the Sanctuary.
description.display: 结合目标的基因数据并将其上传至圣殿。

description.canonical: Deploys a SCORPION EXIMUS unit to fight for you.
description.display: 设置一个为你战斗的毒蝎卓越者魅影。

description.canonical: A persistent waypoint marker for use with the world map. Coordinate your squad and track places of importance!
description.display: 一种使用在世界地图中的持久性标记点。协调你的队伍并追踪一些重要的位置！

description.canonical:
Standard tool for cutting ore and gems out of stone.

Travel far from Hub settlements for the best chance of mining rare minerals.
description.display:
从石头中切割矿石和宝石的标准的工具。

远离城镇中心，将有更高几率开采出稀有矿物。

description.canonical:
A more accurate variation of the Nosam Cutter.

Travel far from Hub settlements for the best chance of mining rare minerals.
description.display:
一款更精准的诺萨姆切割器变体。

远离城镇中心，将有更高几率开采出稀有矿物。

description.canonical:
Enhanced with cybernetics, this tool is able to locate nearby gems and ore veins and has chance to retrieve Rare Gems on any Landscape.

Travel far from Hub settlements for the best chance of mining rare minerals.
description.display:
经过控制理论的升级，这把工具能够定位附近的宝石和矿脉，并有几率在任何地形中获取稀有宝石。

远离城镇中心，将有更高几率开采出稀有矿物。

description.canonical:
Fast-ignition, high-intensity mining tool capable of extracting the rarest of materials with surgical precision.

Can be used to retrieve Rare Gems on any Landscape. Travel far from Hub settlements for the best chance of mining rare minerals.
description.display:
这是一把快速点火、高强度的采矿工具，能够以外科手术般的精确度开采最稀有的矿物。

可在任何地形中获取稀有宝石。远离城镇中心，将有更高几率开采出稀有矿物。

description.display: 设置一个为你战斗的恐鸟卓越者魅影。

description.canonical: Provokes an immediate confrontation with your Kuva Lich or Sister of Parvos: an insult which cannot be ignored.
description.display: 引发与你的赤毒玄骸或帕尔沃斯姐妹的直接对抗：这是一种不容忽视的侮辱。

description.canonical: Hardens skin, fortifying against damage while restricting movement.

description.canonical: Coats the target in a film that refracts light, allowing undetected movement.
description.display: 将目标包覆在一层折射光线的薄膜中，使移动变得无法被侦测。

description.canonical: Revives a target that is bleeding out, and provides a bonus revive to any allies in range.
description.display: 复活一名倒地出血的目标，并为范围内的友军提供一次额外的复活。

description.canonical: Elevates adrenaline levels to enable faster movement while increasing sensitivity to damage.
description.display: 提升肾上腺素水平以加快移动，但对伤害更加敏感。

description.display: 一个战甲的克隆复制品，可以部署来协助 Tenno 执行任务。

description.canonical: Used to bypass security systems that protect the Razorback's holding cell.

description.canonical: An Omni is a multi-use Railjack tool for extinguishing fires, grounding electrical hazards, and repairing hull ruptures. Use outside the Railjack to instantly recall back to the ship.

description.canonical:
Purpose built to recover Servofish without damage. Delivers a disabling electromagnetic pulse after a successful hit if timed correctly.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna. This spear is most effective on Servofish found in the Orb Vallis (Venus).
description.display:
一种能够捕获伺服鱼，同时避免对其造成伤害的工具。若在恰当的时机命中目标，它就会释放出带有失能效果的电磁脉冲波。

从福尔图娜的 The Business 处获得。这根鱼叉对奥布山谷（金星）的伺服鱼最有效。

description.canonical:
Successful electromagnetic pulses radiate outward also disabling any nearby Servofish.

Obtained from The Business in Fortuna. This spear is most effective on Servofish found in the Orb Vallis (Venus).
description.display:
成功发射的电磁脉冲往外散发同时瘫痪任何附近的伺服鱼。

从福尔图娜的 The Business 处获得。这根鱼叉对奥布山谷（金星）的伺服鱼最有效。
